_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Runtime override controls give no UI feedback

steps.description: Update both PATCH endpoints in runtime_overrides.py to return the steps-table fragment + HX-Trigger showToast header; bulk endpoint reports actual updated count and emits info toast on zero-eligible branch
Review S01 — response contract, helper placement, toast strings, validation paths
Extract fragments/item_steps_table.html; wire hx-target=#item-steps-table + hx-swap=outerHTML on per-step <select> and bulk Apply; preserve hx-disabled-elt
Review S03 — template extraction completeness, htmx wiring, disabled-elt preservation, fragment id consistency
Reproduction + regression tests under tests/dashboard/: response shape, exact toast strings, count correctness, zero-eligible branch, validation paths carry no HX-Trigger
Review S05 — semantic correctness (no shape-only assertions), coverage of every AC, test isolation, correct test directory
Final cross-agent review: end-to-end coherence, toast-string consistency between S01 and S05, scope compliance
QV: Browser verification — per-step + bulk runtime override show toast and update Model column without manual refresh
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
